meta.title: The Realignment Ep. 20: The Afghanistan Papers, Bonus Episode with Douglas Feith and John Walters
meta.description:
In this season one bonus episode we talk to Hudson Institute’s John Walters and Douglas Feith about the explosive Afghanistan Papers and reflect on the history of the war.

Subscribe to be notified about new episodes every week:

Spotify: https://spoti.fi/2Kb1kyz
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast...
Google Podcasts: https://bit.ly/2Ox1d4o
Stitcher: https://bit.ly/2OAjqy9

Learn more about The Realignment at: https://www.hudson.org/
